posts.text: bseindia.com 78e4c6e0-baf3-439f-b3d2-2f3e65b900d0.pdf Highlight of the latest quarterly result is the strong topline growth….standalone business grew around 15% but consolidated grew around 25%…means much of the growgh is coming from international NRF business. By now all of us know management is very opaque and provide very little insite so tried to dig dipper into NRF and found some interesting info….
